rdf:Description.dc:description: Empirical CDF of horizontal capacity Hmax at each of four scour stages (S/D = 0.3125, 0.375, 0.4375, 0.5; n = 200 per stage, total 800 realisations). Four monotone shades + step markers differentiate the stages; p5 and p95 reference lines annotate the quantile bounds. The ~ 2.3x spread between p5 and p95 at every stage shows that soil-parameter uncertainty dominates over scour geometry uncertainty at any single S/D.
